recommendations: Add TypeScript to your Core Competencies and weave it into experience bullets if you have used it in any capacity at Tech Corp.
Quantify impact where possible — e.g., number of users served, components built, or API response time improvements.
Consider adding a Tools or Testing category to Core Competencies to signal broader engineering maturity.
If you have used any component libraries (e.g., Material UI, Tailwind, Storybook) or state management tools (e.g., Redux, Zustand), add them to strengthen the frontend signal.
gapAnalysis.summaryChanges: Rewritten to mirror JD priorities — React, TypeScript, Node.js, and scalable UI/API delivery — while preserving the candidate's five-year full-stack identity and signalling comfort in fast-paced product environments.

resume.name: John Smith
resume.summary: Full-stack Software Engineer with 5 years of experience delivering React applications and Node.js APIs in fast-paced web development environments. Skilled in building scalable UI components and RESTful backend services across the full request lifecycle. Brings TypeScript fluency and a strong product focus to every layer of the stack.

experience.title: Frontend Developer
bullets: Designed and delivered scalable UI components in React, improving code reusability and accelerating feature delivery across production web applications.
Built and maintained REST APIs using Node.js to support frontend data requirements, ensuring reliable and performant client-server communication.
Applied TypeScript across frontend and API layers to enforce type safety, reduce runtime defects, and improve long-term codebase maintainability.

coverLetter.subject: Application for Software Engineer
coverLetter.body:
With five years of full-stack web development experience and a proven track record building React applications and Node.js APIs at Tech Corp, I am confident I can contribute immediately to your engineering team. My work spans the full request lifecycle — from designing scalable UI components on the frontend to implementing and maintaining production REST APIs on the backend — which maps directly to the scope of this role.

At Tech Corp, I have built React web applications consumed by real users and delivered REST APIs using Node.js in a production environment. I understand what it takes to write maintainable, component-driven frontend code and to design API contracts that hold up under load. I have also worked with TypeScript to bring static typing discipline to JavaScript codebases, reducing runtime errors and improving team velocity.

I thrive in fast-paced environments where shipping quality software quickly is the expectation, not the exception. I am comfortable navigating ambiguity, iterating rapidly on feedback, and collaborating closely with product and design stakeholders to deliver features that matter.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my full-stack background aligns with your team's immediate needs. Thank you for your consideration.
